Records.authors: Marzucca, Robin, McLeod, Andrew J., Nega, Christoph
Records.description: Two-loop integral family for mixed QCD-EW corrections to $gg \to H$ at $\mathcal{O}(g^3 g_s^2)$. This family has three top-level topologies and contains the elliptic two-mass sunrise integral as a subtopology. Depends on $s$, $m_t$, and a second mass $M$ (which can be $m_H$, $m_W$, or $m_Z$). Contains 26 master integrals computed through $\mathcal{O}(\varepsilon^2)$ (weight 6). The elliptic sector is governed by the sunrise elliptic curve with period $\varpi_0$ and the additional transcendental function $G_1$. Unlike Family 2, the function $G_2$ is not needed for this family. Results expressed as iterated integrals over algebraic and elliptic integration kernels. The first top-level topology shown has 4 vertices and 5 edges: a triangle with a cross-diagonal. Numerically cross-checked against AMFlow.
ancillaryPaths: ancillary files on arXiv and Zenodo (doi:10.5281/zenodo.14843619)
